decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly reanimating powerful creatures from the graveyard using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Solitude, while also using instant speed spells like Ephemerate and Force of Negation to control the game. The creatures in the deck, such as Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Griselbrand, have powerful effects that can quickly turn the tide of the game in your favor. By efficiently reanimating creatures and disrupting your opponent's game plan, this deck aims to dominate the battlefield and secure a quick victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing instant reanimation spells like Goryo's Vengeance and Faithful Mending to bring powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier onto the battlefield quickly. By combining these instant reanimator cards with disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Negation, the deck aims to control the game while setting up its combo pieces to overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats. The key strategy is to efficiently reanimate creatures and disrupt the opponent's game plan in order to secure a victory through overwhelming board presence and control.

The main concept of this deck revolves around utilizing artifacts and cards that have synergy with artifacts to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a high amount of threats. By leveraging cards like Urza's Saga, Emry, Lurker of the Loch, and Arcbound Ravager, the deck can consistently put pressure on the opponent while also disrupting their game plan with cards like Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke. The goal is to combine aggressive creatures with powerful artifact abilities to create a fast and efficient aggro strategy that can outpace the opponent and secure a victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing mill cards like Archive Trap, Fractured Sanity, and Hedron Crab to quickly deplete the opponent's library. It also includes control elements like Drown in the Loch and Fatal Push to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to win by milling the opponent out before they can assemble their win conditions. Surgical Extraction is included to disrupt key cards in the opponent's graveyard. The land base includes a mix of fetch lands and utility lands to ensure consistent mana access and to trigger mill effects like Field of Ruin.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on fast and aggressive creature strategies, using cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. The deck also includes burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment for additional reach and removal. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly with a combination of efficient creatures and burn spells, while also using cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Seasoned Pyromancer to generate card advantage and maintain board presence. Additionally, the inclusion of Ranger-Captain of Eos provides additional utility and flexibility to the deck's game plan.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature plays and burn spells to quickly overwhelm opponents. It uses cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to put pressure on the opponent early on, while utilizing cards like Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge for additional damage and removal. With a mix of efficient creatures and powerful spells, the deck aims to finish games quickly before the opponent has a chance to stabilize. The inclusion of cards like Arena of Glory and Ranger-Captain of Eos provide additional utility and protection for the aggressive game plan.

The main focus of this deck is to control the opponent's board and hand through various counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage. By utilizing cards like Fatal Push, Counterspell, and Cling to Dust, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan and gain card advantage through spells like Consult the Star Charts and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian. Additionally, with a mix of creatures and planeswalkers, the deck can apply pressure on the opponent while still maintaining control of the game. The mana base is designed to ensure consistency in casting spells of both blue and black colors.

The key concept of this deck is to control the game by countering spells, removing threats, and disrupting the opponent's strategy. The deck utilizes powerful control cards like Counterspell, Subtlety, and Fatal Push to control the board while also having access to card advantage through cards like Consult the Star Charts and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian. By efficiently managing resources and disrupting the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and secure victory through strategic play and card advantage.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and disruption spells, punishing their resources and slowing down their game plan. By combining efficient threats like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury with disruptive spells like Prismatic Ending and Teferi, Time Raveler, the deck aims to control the board and pressure the opponent simultaneously. Additionally, cards like Consign to Memory and Solitude provide flexibility and resilience to the deck, allowing it to adapt to different matchups and strategies.

This deck relies on using Birthing Ritual to quickly generate mana to cast powerful creatures and disruption spells. By utilizing the card advantage provided by Shardless Agent and Coiling Oracle, as well as the tempo gaining abilities of Ice-Fang Coatl and Harbinger of the Seas, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and efficient aggro strategy. The addition of Endurance and Subtlety allows for additional disruption and protection, while the mix of lands and versatile spells provides flexibility in adapting to various matchups.

This deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo utilizing cards like Lotus Bloom and Goblin Charbelcher to quickly win the game without relying on traditional lands. The deck also includes control elements like Force of Negation and Disrupting Shoal to protect the combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Tameshi, Reality Architect and Waterlogged Teachings provide additional consistency and card advantage, while cards like Thundertrap Trainer and Harbinger of the Seas offer additional utility and disruption options. The goal is to quickly set up and execute the combo while controlling the game with a variety of spells and abilities.

This deck focuses on creating a powerful board presence by ramping up mana quickly to play big threats like Primeval Titan. The goal is to combo off with cards like Amulet of Vigor and Urza's Saga to generate huge amounts of mana and overwhelm the opponent with multiple threats in a single turn. The deck also includes tools like Scapeshift and Green Sun's Zenith for flexibility and control, allowing for different paths to victory depending on the matchup. The key strategy is to set up efficient ramp and combo pieces to overwhelm the opponent and secure the win.

This deck focuses on disrupting your opponent's game plan and controlling the board with counterspells, removal, and powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Time Raveler and Teferi, Hero of Dominaria. The deck also utilizes cards like Prismatic Ending and Solitude to deal with threats efficiently. The inclusion of Meticulous Archive, Consult the Star Charts, and Lórien Revealed helps the deck maintain card advantage and find answers to various situations. The deck's win condition is to outvalue the opponent and ultimately close out the game with a well-timed threat or by grinding out incremental advantages.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creatures, burn spells, and combat tricks to quickly overwhelm the opponent and win the game. The deck includes powerful creatures like Guide of Souls, Ragavan, and Seasoned Pyromancer, along with burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to deal direct damage to the opponent. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provide additional support and buffs to the creatures. The deck also includes some utility cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Thraben Charm to further disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of Arena of Glory and Elegant Parlor helps to maintain board control and provide additional advantage.

Utilizing the powerful UrzaTron lands, this deck focuses on controlling the game with powerful Eldrazi creatures and spells. With access to strong removal options like Dismember and Kozilek's Command, along with disruptive creatures like Thought-Knot Seer and Sire of Seven Deaths, the deck aims to outvalue opponents while locking down the board with cards like Chalice of the Void. Karn, the Great Creator provides versatility and Ugin, Eye of the Storms offers a powerful win condition. By assembling the UrzaTron lands and deploying impactful threats, this deck seeks to dominate the late game.

This deck focuses on using a variety of creatures and combo pieces to generate value and control the board. It utilizes tools like Agatha's Soul Cauldron and Green Sun's Zenith to bring out key creatures like Yawgmoth, Thran Physician and Grist, the Hunger Tide. The deck also includes cards like Walking Ballista and Spymaster's Vault for additional utility and card advantage. By assembling the right combination of creatures and using the toolbox approach, this deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents in Modern 1 vs 1 matchups.
